case_title: MICHAEL COLEMAN VS. XA, THE EXPERIENTIAL AGENCY, INC., A NEVADA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLEMAN, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT XA, THE EXPERIENTIAL AGENCY, INC., A NEVADA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
